2026-03-13T09:59:45.3435988Z Applied labels **Mgmt**, **Support**, **needs-team-triage**, and **Service Attention** to issue #57073, and posted a triage comment with impact analysis, debugging strategies, investigation hints, and a sub-task checklist. Key finding: the MPG emitter likely determines `resourceScope` from the TypeSpec model decorator (`@subscriptionResource`) rather than from the actual resource ID pattern or method `operationScope`, causing the bug when one model is shared across both subscription-scoped and tenant-scoped interfaces.

IMPORTANT: Comments are subject to validation constraints enforced by the MCP server - maximum 65536 characters for the complete comment (including footer which is added automatically), 10 mentions (@username), and 50 links. Exceeding these limits will result in an immediate error with specific guidance. NOTE: By default, this tool requires discussions:write permission. If your GitHub App lacks Discussions permission, set 'discussions: false' in the workflow's safe-outputs.add-comment configuration to exclude this permission. Auto-targeting only works for issue, pull_request, discussion, and comment event triggers — it does NOT work for schedule, workflow_dispatch, push, or workflow_run triggers. {"timestamp":"2026-03-13T09:58:10.306304313Z","direction":"IN","type":"RESPONSE","server_id":"github","payload":{"id":1,"jsonrpc":"2.0","result":{"content":[{"text":"{\"number\":57073,\"title\":\"[Codegen Bug] MPG generator incorrectly assigns resourceScope \\u0026#39;Subscription\\u0026#39; instead of \\u0026#39;Tenant\\u0026#39; for TenantSupportTicket in tspCodeModel.json\",\"body\":\"## Bug Description\\n\\nThe MPG (Management Plane Generator) codegen incorrectly assigns `resourceScope: \\u0026#34;Subscription\\u0026#34;` to the `TenantSupportTicket` resource in the generated `tspCodeModel.json`, when it should be `\\u0026#34;Tenant\\u0026#34;`.\\n\\n## Root Cause\\n\\nIn the TypeSpec spec ([SupportTicketDetails.tsp](https://github.com/Azure/azure-rest-api-specs/blob/[REDACTED]/specification/support/resource-manager/Microsoft.Support/Support/SupportTicketDetails.tsp)), the `SupportTicketDetails` model is marked `@subscriptionResource` and shared by two operation interfaces with different scopes:\\n\\n1. **`SupportTickets`** — subscription-scoped (includes `SubscriptionIdParameter`)\\n2. **`SupportTicketsNoSubscription`** — tenant-scoped (no `SubscriptionIdParameter`)\\n\\nIn `client.tsp`, these are renamed:\\n```tsp\\n@@clientName(SupportTickets, \\u0026#34;SubscriptionSupportTicket\\u0026#34;, \\u0026#34;csharp\\u0026#34;);\\n@@clientName(SupportTicketsNoSubscription, \\u0026#34;TenantSupportTicket\\u0026#34;, \\u0026#34;csharp\\u0026#34;);\\n```\\n\\n## Evidence in tspCodeModel.json\\n\\n### ✅ SubscriptionSupportTicket — Correct (Subscription scope)\\n```json\\n{\\n  \\u0026#34;resourceModelId\\u0026#34;: \\u0026#34;Microsoft.Support.SupportTicketDetails\\u0026#34;,\\n  \\u0026#34;resourceIdPattern\\u0026#34;: \\u0026#34;/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Support/supportTickets/{supportTicketName}\\u0026#34;,\\n  \\u0026#34;resourceType\\u0026#34;: \\u0026#34;Microsoft.Support/supportTickets\\u0026#34;,\\n  \\u0026#34;methods\\u0026#34;: [\\n    { \\u0026#34;methodId\\u0026#34;: \\u0026#34;Microsoft.Support.SupportTickets.create\\u0026#34;, \\u0026#34;operationScope\\u0026#34;: \\u0026#34;Subscription\\u0026#34; },\\n    { \\u0026#34;methodId\\u0026#34;: \\u0026#34;Microsoft.Support.SupportTickets.get\\u0026#34;, \\u0026#34;operationScope\\u0026#34;: \\u0026#34;Subscription\\u0026#34; },\\n    { \\u0026#34;methodId\\u0026#34;: \\u0026#34;Microsoft.Support.SupportTickets.update\\u0026#34;, \\u0026#34;operationScope\\u0026#34;: \\u0026#34;Subscription\\u0026#34; },\\n    { \\u0026#34;methodId\\u0026#34;: \\u0026#34;Microsoft.Support.SupportTickets.list\\u0026#34;, \\u0026#34;operationScope\\u0026#34;: \\u0026#34;Subscription\\u0026#34; }\\n  ],\\n  \\u0026#34;resourceScope\\u0026#34;: \\u0026#34;Subscription\\u0026#34;,   ✅ Correct\\n  \\u0026#34;resourceName\\u0026#34;: \\u0026#34;SubscriptionSupportTicket\\u0026#34;\\n}\\n```\\n\\n### ❌ TenantSupportTicket — Wrong scope (should be Tenant)\\n```json\\n{\\n  \\u0026#34;resourceModelId\\u0026#34;: \\u0026#34;Microsoft.Support.SupportTicketDetails\\u0026#34;,\\n  \\u0026#34;resourceIdPattern\\u0026#34;: \\u0026#34;/providers/Microsoft.Support/supportTickets/{supportTicketName}\\u0026#34;,\\n  \\u0026#34;resourceType\\u0026#34;: \\u0026#34;Microsoft.Support/supportTickets\\u0026#34;,\\n  \\u0026#34;methods\\u0026#34;: [\\n    { \\u0026#34;methodId\\u0026#34;: \\u0026#34;Microsoft.Support.SupportTicketsNoSubscription.create\\u0026#34;, \\u0026#34;operationScope\\u0026#34;: \\u0026#34;Tenant\\u0026#34; },\\n    { \\u0026#34;methodId\\u0026#34;: \\u0026#34;Microsoft.Support.SupportTicketsNoSubscription.get\\u0026#34;, \\u0026#34;operationScope\\u0026#34;: \\u0026#34;Tenant\\u0026#34; },\\n    { \\u0026#34;methodId\\u0026#34;: \\u0026#34;Microsoft.Support.SupportTicketsNoSubscription.update\\u0026#34;, \\u0026#34;operationScope\\u0026#34;: \\u0026#34;Tenant\\u0026#34; },\\n    { \\u0026#34;methodId\\u0026#34;: \\u0026#34;Microsoft.Support.SupportTicketsNoSubscription.list\\u0026#34;, \\u0026#34;operationScope\\u0026#34;: \\u0026#34;Tenant\\u0026#34; }\\n  ],\\n  \\u0026#34;resourceScope\\u0026#34;: \\u0026#34;Subscription\\u0026#34;,   ❌ BUG: Should be \\u0026#34;Tenant\\u0026#34;\\n  \\u0026#34;resourceName\\u0026#34;: \\u0026#34;TenantSupportTicket\\u0026#34;\\n}\\n```\\n\\n**Note:** All methods under `TenantSupportTicket` have `\\u0026#34;operationScope\\u0026#34;: \\u0026#34;Tenant\\u0026#34;` and use tenant-level paths (`/providers/Microsoft.Support/...` without `{subscriptionId}`), but the top-level `resourceScope` is incorrectly set to `\\u0026#34;Subscription\\u0026#34;`.\\n\\nFor comparison, another tenant-scoped resource `SupportTicketNoSubCommunication` in the same tspCodeModel.json correctly has `\\u0026#34;resourceScope\\u0026#34;: \\u0026#34;Tenant\\u0026#34;`.\\n\\n## Impact on Generated SDK Code\\n\\nDue to the incorrect `resourceScope`, the generator produces incorrect code for `TenantSupportTicketCollection`:\\n\\n1. **Wrong `ValidateResourceId`**: The generated code only validates against `SubscriptionResource.ResourceType`, rejecting `TenantResource.ResourceType` — even though tenant-level access is a valid scenario.\\n\\n2. **Wrong XML doc comments**: The generated class doc says:\\n   \\u0026gt; Each TenantSupportTicketResource in the collection will belong to the same instance of **SubscriptionResource**.\\n\\n   This is incorrect for a tenant-scoped resource.\\n\\n3. **Wrong parent scope placement**: `GetTenantSupportTickets()` is generated on `MockableSupportSubscriptionResource` instead of being also available on `MockableSupportTenantResource` as a collection getter.\\n\\n### SDK Workarounds Required\\n\\nThese issues required custom code in `TenantSupportTicketCollection.cs` to:\\n- Override `ValidateResourceId` to accept both `SubscriptionResource.ResourceType` and `TenantResource.ResourceType`\\n- Restore `GetAll`/`GetAllAsync` methods and `IEnumerable`/`IAsyncEnumerable` interfaces for backward compatibility\\n\\n## Expected Behavior\\n\\nThe `TenantSupportTicket` resource entry in `tspCodeModel.json` should have:\\n```json\\n\\u0026#34;resourceScope\\u0026#34;: \\u0026#34;Tenant\\u0026#34;\\n```\\n\\nThis would cause the generator to:\\n- Generate `ValidateResourceId` checking against `TenantResource.ResourceType`\\n- Generate correct doc comments referencing `TenantResource`\\n- Place the collection under `TenantResource` scope\\n\\n## Spec Reference\\n\\n- **Spec commit**: `[REDACTED]`\\n- **Spec file**: `specification/support/resource-manager/Microsoft.Support/Support/SupportTicketDetails.tsp`\\n- **Emitter**: `eng/azure-typespec-http-client-csharp-mgmt-emitter-package.json`\\n\\n## Reproduction\\n\\nGenerate the Support SDK from the TypeSpec spec and inspect the `tspCodeModel.json` for the `TenantSupportTicket` resource entry.\\n\\n## Affected SDK\\n\\n`sdk/support/Azure.ResourceManager.Support`\",\"state\":\"open\",\"html_url\":\"https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/issues/57073\",\"user\":{\"login\":\"mzhongl524\",\"id\":13110707,\"profile_url\":\"https://github.com/mzhongl524\",\"avatar_url\":\"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/13110707?v=4\"},\"author_association\":\"MEMBER\",\"labels\":[\"bug\"],\"reactions\":{\"total_count\":1,\"+1\":0,\"-1\":0,\"laugh\":0,\"confused\":0,\"heart\":0,\"hooray\":0,\"rocket\":0,\"eyes\":1},\"created_at\":\"2026-03-13T09:55:56Z\",\"updated_at\":\"2026-03-13T09:55:56Z\"}","type":"text"}]}}}

Bug] MPG generator incorrectly assigns resourceScope 'Subscription' instead of 'Tenant' for TenantSupportTicket in tspCodeModel.json\",\"body\":\"## Bug Description\\n\\nThe MPG (Management Plane Generator) codegen incorrectly assigns `resourceScope: \\\"Subscription\\\"` to the `TenantSupportTicket` resource in the generated `tspCodeModel.json`, when it should be `\\\"Tenant\\\"`.\\n\\n## Root Cause\\n\\nIn the TypeSpec spec ([SupportTicketDetails.tsp](https://github.com/Azure/azure-rest-api-specs/blob/[REDACTED]/specification/support/resource-manager/Microsoft.Support/Support/SupportTicketDetails.tsp)), the `SupportTicketDetails` model is marked `@subscriptionResource` and shared by two operation interfaces with different scopes:\\n\\n1. **`SupportTickets`** — subscription-scoped (includes `SubscriptionIdParameter`)\\n2. **`SupportTicketsNoSubscription`** — tenant-scoped (no `SubscriptionIdParameter`)\\n\\nIn `client.tsp`, these are renamed:\\n```tsp\\n@@clientName(SupportTickets, \\\"SubscriptionSupportTicket\\\", \\\"csharp\\\");\\n@@clientName(SupportTicketsNoSubscription, \\\"TenantSupportTicket\\\", \\\"csharp\\\");\\n```\\n\\n## Evidence in tspCodeModel.json\\n\\n### ✅ SubscriptionSupportTicket — Correct (Subscription scope)\\n```json\\n{\\n  \\\"resourceModelId\\\": \\\"Microsoft.Support.SupportTicketDetails\\\",\\n  \\\"resourceIdPattern\\\": \\\"/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Support/supportTickets/{supportTicketName}\\\",\\n  \\\"resourceType\\\": \\\"Microsoft.Support/supportTickets\\\",\\n  \\\"methods\\\": [\\n    { \\\"methodId\\\": \\\"Microsoft.Support.SupportTickets.create\\\", \\\"operationScope\\\": \\\"Subscription\\\" },\\n    { \\\"methodId\\\": \\\"Microsoft.Support.SupportTickets.get\\\", \\\"operationScope\\\": \\\"Subscription\\\" },\\n    { \\\"methodId\\\": \\\"Microsoft.Support.SupportTickets.update\\\", \\\"operationScope\\\": \\\"Subscription\\\" },\\n    { \\\"methodId\\\": \\\"Microsoft.Support.SupportTickets.list\\\", \\\"operationScope\\\": \\\"Subscription\\\" }\\n  ],\\n  \\\"resourceScope\\\": \\\"Subscription\\\",   ✅ Correct\\n  \\\"resourceName\\\": \\\"SubscriptionSupportTicket\\\"\\n}\\n```\\n\\n### ❌ TenantSupportTicket — Wrong scope (should be Tenant)\\n```json\\n{\\n  \\\"resourceModelId\\\": \\\"Microsoft.Support.SupportTicketDetails\\\",\\n  \\\"resourceIdPattern\\\": \\\"/providers/Microsoft.Support/supportTickets/{supportTicketName}\\\",\\n  \\\"resourceType\\\": \\\"Microsoft.Support/supportTickets\\\",\\n  \\\"methods\\\": [\\n    { \\\"methodId\\\": \\\"Microsoft.Support.SupportTicketsNoSubscription.create\\\", \\\"operationScope\\\": \\\"Tenant\\\" },\\n    { \\\"methodId\\\": \\\"Microsoft.Support.SupportTicketsNoSubscription.get\\\", \\\"operationScope\\\": \\\"Tenant\\\" },\\n    { \\\"methodId\\\": \\\"Microsoft.Support.SupportTicketsNoSubscription.update\\\", \\\"operationScope\\\": \\\"Tenant\\\" },\\n    { \\\"methodId\\\": \\\"Microsoft.Support.SupportTicketsNoSubscription.list\\\", \\\"operationScope\\\": \\\"Tenant\\\" }\\n  ],\\n  \\\"resourceScope\\\": \\\"Subscription\\\",   ❌ BUG: Should be \\\"Tenant\\\"\\n  \\\"resourceName\\\": \\\"TenantSupportTicket\\\"\\n}\\n```\\n\\n**Note:** All methods under `TenantSupportTicket` have `\\\"operationScope\\\": \\\"Tenant\\\"` and use tenant-level paths (`/providers/Microsoft.Support/...` without `{subscriptionId}`), but the top-level `resourceScope` is incorrectly set to `\\\"Subscription\\\"`.\\n\\nFor comparison, another tenant-scoped resource `SupportTicketNoSubCommunication` in the same tspCodeModel.json correctly has `\\\"resourceScope\\\": \\\"Tenant\\\"`.\\n\\n## Impact on Generated SDK Code\\n\\nDue to the incorrect `resourceScope`, the generator produces incorrect code for `TenantSupportTicketCollection`:\\n\\n1. **Wrong `ValidateResourceId`**: The generated code only validates against `SubscriptionResource.ResourceType`, rejecting `TenantResource.ResourceType` — even though tenant-level access is a valid scenario.\\n\\n2. **Wrong XML doc comments**: The generated class doc says:\\n   \\u003e Each TenantSupportTicketResource in the collection will belong to the same instance of **SubscriptionResource**.\\n\\n   This is incorrect for a tenant-scoped resource.\\n\\n3. **Wrong parent scope placement**: `GetTenantSupportTickets()` is generated on `MockableSupportSubscriptionResource` instead of being also available on `MockableSupportTenantResource` as a collection getter.\\n\\n### SDK Workarounds Required\\n\\nThese issues required custom code in `TenantSupportTicketCollection.cs` to:\\n- Override `ValidateResourceId` to accept both `SubscriptionResource.ResourceType` and `TenantResource.ResourceType`\\n- Restore `GetAll`/`GetAllAsync` methods and `IEnumerable`/`IAsyncEnumerable` interfaces for backward compatibility\\n\\n## Expected Behavior\\n\\nThe `TenantSupportTicket` resource entry in `tspCodeModel.json` should have:\\n```json\\n\\\"resourceScope\\\": \\\"Tenant\\\"\\n```\\n\\nThis would cause the generator to:\\n- Generate `ValidateResourceId` checking against `TenantResource.ResourceType`\\n- Generate correct doc comments referencing `TenantResource`\\n- Place the collection under `TenantResource` scope\\n\\n## Spec Reference\\n\\n- **Spec commit**: `[REDACTED]`\\n- **Spec file**: `specification/support/resource-manager/Microsoft.Support/Support/SupportTicketDetails.tsp`\\n- **Emitter**: `eng/azure-typespec-http-client-csharp-mgmt-emitter-package.json`\\n\\n## Reproduction\\n\\nGenerate the Support SDK from the TypeSpec spec and inspect the `tspCodeModel.json` for the `TenantSupportTicket` resource entry.\\n\\n## Affected SDK\\n\\n`sdk/support/Azure.ResourceManager.Support`\",\"author_association\":\"MEMBER\",\"user\":{\"login\":\"mzhongl524\",\"id\":13110707,\"node_id\":\"MDQ6VXNlcjEzMTEwNzA3\",\"avatar_url\":\"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/13110707?v=4\",\"html_url\":\"https://github.com/mzhongl524\",\"gravatar_id\":\"\",\"type\":\"User\",\"site_admin\":false,\"url\":\"https://api.github.com/users/mzhongl524\",\"events_url\":\"https://api.github.com/users/mzhongl524/events{/privacy}\",\"following_url\":\"https://api.github.com/users/mzhongl524/following{/other_user}\",\"followers_url\":\"https://api.github.com/users/mzhongl524/followers\",\"gists_url\":\"https://api.github.com/users/mzhongl524/gists{/gist_id}\",\"organizations_url\":\"https://api.github.com/users/mzhongl524/orgs\",\"received_events_url\":\"https://api.github.com/users/mzhongl524/received_events\",\"repos_url\":\"https://api.github.com/users/mzhongl524/repos\",\"starred_url\":\"https://api.github.com/users/mzhongl524/starred{/owner}{/repo}\",\"subscriptions_url\":\"https://api.github.com/users/mzhongl524/subscriptions\"},\"labels\":[{\"id\":1369687458,\"url\":\"https://api.github.com/repos/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/labels/bug\",\"name\":\"bug\",\"color\":\"eaa875\",\"description\":\"This 2026-03-13T09:59:59.7103615Z {"timestamp":"2026-03-13T09:59:00.621743964Z","direction":"IN","type":"RESPONSE","server_id":"safeoutputs","payload":{"id":3,"jsonrpc":"2.0","result":{"content":[{"text":"{\"result\":\"success\"}","type":"text"}],"isError":false}}}
2026-03-13T09:59:59.7125743Z {"timestamp":"2026-03-13T09:59:40.293751882Z","direction":"OUT","type":"REQUEST","server_id":"safeoutputs","method":"tools/call","payload":{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"arguments":{"body":"## 🎯 Agentic Issue Triage\n\n**Summary:** This is a codegen bug in the MPG (Management Plane Generator / `http-client-csharp-mgmt` emitter) where `TenantSupportTicket`'s `resourceScope` in `tspCodeModel.json` is incorrectly set to `\"Subscription\"` instead of `\"Tenant\"`. This causes cascading incorrect code generation in `sdk/support/Azure.ResourceManager.Support`, requiring SDK-level workarounds.\n\nThe root cause is that `SupportTicketDetails` is annotated `@subscriptionResource` in the TypeSpec spec, but is reused by both a subscription-scoped interface (`SupportTickets`) and a tenant-scoped interface (`SupportTicketsNoSubscription`). The emitter appears to always inherit the `@subscriptionResource` decorator's scope regardless of the actual operation paths/parameters.\n\n\u003cdetails\u003e\n\u003csummary\u003e📋 Impact Analysis\u003c/summary\u003e\n\nThe incorrect `resourceScope` cascades into three SDK issues:\n\n1. **`ValidateResourceId` validates against `SubscriptionResource.ResourceType`** instead of `TenantResource.ResourceType`, causing runtime failures for callers using tenant-level access.\n2. **Wrong XML doc comments** — says each `TenantSupportTicketResource` belongs to `SubscriptionResource`, which is incorrect.\n3. **`GetTenantSupportTickets()` is placed on `MockableSupportSubscriptionResource`** instead of `MockableSupportTenantResource`.\n\nCurrent SDK workaround: `TenantSupportTicketCollection.cs` has custom overrides for `ValidateResourceId` and restores `GetAll`/`GetAllAsync` methods — these should be removable once the generator is fixed.\n\nNote: `SupportTicketNoSubCommunication` in the same `tspCodeModel.json` correctly has `\"resourceScope\": \"Tenant\"`, providing a reference for how the fix should look.\n\n\u003c/details\u003e\n\n\u003cdetails\u003e\n\u003csummary\u003e🔍 Investigation / Debugging Strategies\u003c/summary\u003e\n\n**Emitter code to investigate:**\n- `eng/packages/http-client-csharp-mgmt` — the management plane TypeSpec emitter\n- Look for how `resourceScope` is determined in `tspCodeModel.json` generation: it likely reads the `@subscriptionResource` / `@tenantResource` decorator from the *model* rather than inspecting the actual operation paths or parameters.\n\n**Key question:** Does the emitter determine `resourceScope` from:\n  - The TypeSpec model decorator (`@subscriptionResource`), OR\n  - The actual resource ID pattern / operation paths (which correctly have no `{subscriptionId}` for tenant-scoped), OR\n  - The `operationScope` of the methods?\n\n**Hint from the bug report:** `SupportTicketNoSubCommunication` correctly gets `\"Tenant\"` scope, while `TenantSupportTicket` (which shares the same `@subscriptionResource`-annotated model `SupportTicketDetails`) does not. This suggests the emitter logic may be using the model's decorator as the source of truth, and `SupportTicketNoSubCommunication` gets the right scope because its model doesn't have `@subscriptionResource`.\n\n**Fix direction:** The emitter should infer `resourceScope` from the resource ID pattern or the `operationScope` of the resource's methods, not solely from the model's TypeSpec decorator.\n\n**Repro steps:**\n1. `cd eng/packages/http-client-csharp-mgmt \u0026\u0026 npm install`\n2. Generate SDK from spec commit `[REDACTED]`\n3. Inspect the `tspCodeModel.json` for `TenantSupportTicket.resourceScope`\n\n\u003c/details\u003e\n\n\u003cdetails\u003e\n\u003csummary\u003e✅ Sub-tasks Checklist\u003c/summary\u003e\n\n- [ ] Identify the emitter code path that sets `resourceScope` in `tspCodeModel.json`\n- [ ] Understand why `SupportTicketNoSubCommunication` correctly gets `\"Tenant\"` scope but `TenantSupportTicket` does not\n- [ ] Fix the emitter to derive `resourceScope` from resource ID pattern or method `operationScope` when a model is shared across different-scoped interfaces\n- [ ] Regenerate the Support SDK and verify `TenantSupportTicket.resourceScope == \"Tenant\"` in `tspCodeModel.json`\n- [ ] Verify that `TenantSupportTicketCollection.ValidateResourceId` checks `TenantResource.ResourceType`\n- [ ] Remove custom workarounds in `TenantSupportTicketCollection.cs` that were added to compensate\n- [ ] Add a regression test in the emitter test suite for this scenario (a model shared across subscription-scoped and tenant-scoped interfaces)\n\n\u003c/details\u003e\n\n\u003cdetails\u003e\n\u003csummary\u003e🔗 Relevant Links\u003c/summary\u003e\n\n- [TypeSpec spec file (SupportTicketDetails.tsp)](https://github.com/Azure/azure-rest-api-specs/blob/[REDACTED]/specification/support/resource-manager/Microsoft.Support/Support/SupportTicketDetails.tsp)\n- [MPG emitter source](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/tree/main/eng/packages/http-client-csharp-mgmt)\n- [Azure Resource Manager TypeSpec decorators](https://azure.github.io/typespec-azure/docs/libraries/azure-resource-manager/reference/decorators)\n- [Affected SDK: sdk/support/Azure.ResourceManager.Support](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/tree/main/sdk/support/Azure.ResourceManager.Support)\n\n\u003c/details\u003e\n","item_number":57073},"name":"add_comment"}}}
